{{Quote|According to the Imperial criminal databank, my name's Kole, and that's the only name you need to know. I'm Nym's first mate, which means that I slip a vibro-blade between the ribs of anyone who he don't like. So watch yourself.|Kole, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:FK">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Find Kole|Lok}}</ref>}}
'''Kole''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]] who was part of [[Nym/Legends|Nym's]] [[Lok Revenants/Legends|Lok Revenants]], and served as the [[Feeorin/Legends|Feeorin's]] co-[[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and first mate onboard his [[Starship/Legends|ship]], [[Havoc (starfighter)|''Havoc'']].

==Biography==
===Fighting the Trade federation===
{{Quote|Me and Jinkins, we've been around long enough to bury hundreds of outlanders just like you.|Kole, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:FK" />}}
Kole was known to be a master of disguise, and had, according to Nym, at one time successfully impersonated a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]]. During a trade onboard her [[Space station/Legends|space station]], [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Vana Sage]] double-crossed Nym and his crew, and a fight broke out. Nym, Kole and [[Jinkins]] were captured, with the latter two sent in an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] to the surface of [[Maramere]], while Nym was incarcerated onboard ''[[Stockade]]''. However, thanks to Kole's infiltration expertise, he and Jinkins were able to disguise themselves as professional torturers and gain access to Nym's cell, whereupon the [[Feeorin/Legends|Feeorin]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] escaped from custody.<ref name="Single Cell" />

Kole remained with Nym in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] to come, aiding him during his battle with [[Sol Sixxa]] and the [[Mere]], and later rescued members of his crew from [[Spacestation 1138]], piloting the transport [[Liberator (Mere)|''Liberator'']] in the midst of a fierce battle.<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''</ref>

===Galactic Civil War===
{{Quote|There's an Imperial research facility on Lok that our spies think is filled with experimental weapons. Nym wants whatever that base is building.|Kole, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:FK" />}}
After the defeat of the Trade Federation, Kole and Jinkins remained loyal to Nym and stayed with him almost continually over the years,<ref name="Insider">{{InsiderCite|65|Who's Who in Star Wars Galaxies|Who's Who in ''Star Wars'' Galaxies}}</ref> with Kole serving as Nym's [[First Mate/Legends|first mate]].<ref name="SWG:FK" /> Following the Clone Wars, Nym assumed the leadership of the planet Lok and ruled the planet for decades. At the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Lok had fallen under the control of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] but Nym remained the effective ruler of the planet.<ref name="Insider" />

[[File:Lok_Revenants_leaders.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Kole with the other leaders of the Lok Revenants.]]
After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Nym and Kole were very interested in a secret Imperial [[Imperial Research Facility (Lok)|research facility]] on Lok that produced experimental weapons.<ref name="SWG:FK" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> the Lok Revenants learnt from the corrupted Imperial [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Moore]] that the Empire had completed the development of a new weapon known as [[Imperial Military Grade Grenade Casing Unit]] (IMGGCU).<ref name="SWG:SwSMA">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Speak with Sergeant Moore, again|Lok}}</ref> The Chadra-Fan therefore decided to steal some IMGGCU prototypes.<ref name="SWG:FK" />

Kole thus tasked a group of spacers who previously worked with [[Vana Sage]] and Jinkins with stealing novel weapons in the Imperial research facility.<ref name="SWG:FK" /> Although the facility was not guarded by Imperial troops, the spacers had to fight numerous mercenaries and [[Droideka/Legends|droidekas]] that defended the place. The Revenants finally found crates of IMGGCU prototypes and research data and brought them back to Kole in [[Nym's Base|Nym's fortress]].<ref name="SWG:RtrdaI">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Retrieve the research data and IMGGCUs|Lok}}</ref>

In the meantime, the tensions between the Lok Revenants and the [[Sulfur Lake Pirates]], another criminal group active on Lok, turned to open war. After some setbacks,<ref name="SWG:NP">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Negotiate Peace|Lok}}</ref> the pirates set up an elaborate plan to directly attack Nym in his [[Nym's Base|palace]]. They hijacked a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] carrying an envoy of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooinan]] politicians to a meeting with Nym. As the shuttle landed in the courtyard of the palace, Nym and the other leaders of the Lok Revenants—Vana Sage, Kole and Jinkins—arrived to greet the Tatooinan envoy. A battle subsequently erupted in the palace when the Sulfur Lake Pirates emerged unexpectedly from the shuttle and attacked the Revenants. However, the superior fighting skills of Nym's henchmen allowed them to eliminate every Sulfur Lake Pirate. Nym, Kole, and the other leaders of the Lok Revenants survived the attack.<ref name="SWG:E">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Envoy|Lok}}</ref>

==Personality and traits==
Kole was a capable pilot and engineer,<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter" /> but his chief skill was his ability to disguise himself.<ref name="Single Cell" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kole first appeared in ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'', then went on to play a supporting role in ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''. A slightly aged Kole was given a model in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', along with his partner Nym. ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' mistakenly refers to Bavo, the identity Kole assumes in "[[Single Cell]]," as an actual character and not an alias.

Kole was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|Non-Player Character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:NTP" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Kole was added to the game as part of the so-called "[[W:c:swg:Nym's Theme Park|Nym's Theme Park]],"<ref name="SWG:NTP" /> released with the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 3 Notes: 8 October 03|Publish 3]]" on [[October 8]], 2003.<ref name="SonyCite-Publish 3: The Warren">{{SonyCite|url=recent_updates.jsp?o=60890|text=Publish 3: The Warren}}</ref> His dialogues and quests were modified after Nym's Theme Park was revamped with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Game Update 16|Game Update 16]]," on [[March 23]], [[2010]].<ref name="SonyCite-Game Update 16: ''Star Wars'' Galaxies™: Stronghold of the Lok Revenants">{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=68713&month=032010|text=Game Update 16: ''Star Wars'' Galaxies™: Stronghold of the Lok Revenants}}</ref>
